Web_UI.Sora_Custom_Label: This is an English test string on the generic pilots page!
Web_UI.Pilot_Meta_Description_Hero: {pilot_name}, a hero pilot, has the {talent5_type} pilot talent {talent5}.
Web_UI.PilotTalentType_Meta_Description_More: {TalentTypeName} pilot talent type includes {talent1}, {talent2}, {talent3}, and more.
Web_UI.ModuleGroup_Meta_Description: {groupName}: {groupDescription} View all {groupName} modules in War Robots Frontiers.
Web_UI.PilotPersonality_Meta_Description: {name}: View detailed information about this pilot personality in War Robots Frontiers. Includes traits and effects.
Web_UI.PilotClass_Meta_Description: {name}: View detailed information about this pilot class in War Robots Frontiers. Includes characteristics and abilities.
Web_UI.Module_Meta_Description: {name}: View detailed information about this module in War Robots Frontiers. Includes stats, effects, and usage information.
Web_UI.Robot_Meta_Description: {robot_name}: View detailed information about this {robot_type} robot platform in War Robots Frontiers. Includes core modules and factory presets.
Web_UI.CharacterPreset_Meta_Description: {preset_name}: View detailed information about this {character_type} character preset in War Robots Frontiers. Includes modules and pilot information.
Web_UI.Robots_Description: Bot platforms that represent themed robots as they are referenced by the community, including their core modules and titan weapons.
Web_UI.AI_Bots_Description: Bot builds used by AI when there are not enough players to fill a match.
Web_UI.Factory_Bots_Description: Pre-configured bot builds created by the game developers.

TestStats.desc_ArmorBoost: This stat provides {ArmorBoost} bonus to the pilot

TestStats.desc_CastDuration: This stat provides {CastDuration} bonus to the pilot
